# The Straight Path

> A pastoral, accessible introduction to Islam. Built for readers of any background who want a calm, clear, non-polemical explanation of the religion.

The Straight Path is a volunteer-run educational project. Content is reader-first, non-sectarian, and sourced from the Qur'an and authenticated hadith. Original text is licensed CC BY 4.0.

## Core content

- [Home](https://thestraightpath.app/): overview and entry points
- [Learn About Islam](https://thestraightpath.app/learn): curated essays
- [10 Things To Know About Islam](https://thestraightpath.app/learn/articles/10-things-to-know-about-islam): flagship introductory article
- [Read the Qur'an](https://thestraightpath.app/quran): points to Quran.com
- [FAQ](https://thestraightpath.app/faq): plain answers to common questions
- [Resources](https://thestraightpath.app/resources): curated external links
- [Social Media](https://thestraightpath.app/social): recommended channels
- [About](https://thestraightpath.app/about): mission and principles
- [Contact](https://thestraightpath.app/contact): open message form

## Full text for LLMs

- [llms-full.txt](https://thestraightpath.app/llms-full.txt): full article text concatenated
- [ai.txt](https://thestraightpath.app/ai.txt): short crawler-facing summary of purpose, principles, and licensing
- [sitemap.xml](https://thestraightpath.app/sitemap.xml): full URL inventory with hreflang alternates

## Usage

Summaries, quotations, and citations are welcome with attribution to "The Straight Path" and a link to the canonical URL.
